title: POST /books — Create a new book
evidence: src/app.ts:13-32 — POST endpoint with full validation and insertion

title: GET /books — List all books with author filter
evidence: src/app.ts:34-43 — GET endpoint supporting ?author= query parameter

title: GET /books/{id} — Get single book by ID
evidence: src/app.ts:45-53 — GET endpoint with ID parameter and 404 handling

title: PUT /books/{id} — Update a book
evidence: src/app.ts:55-92 — PUT endpoint with partial update support

title: Store data in SQLite
evidence: src/db.ts:1-24 — better-sqlite3 initialization and schema creation

title: Return JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
evidence: src/app.ts — 201 for create, 200 for success, 400 for validation, 404 for not found, 204 for delete

title: Include input validation (title and author required)
evidence: src/app.ts:15-26 — POST validation; lines 64-68 — PUT validation

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md:1-59 — Complete setup, run, test, and endpoint documentation

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: tests/books.test.ts — 7 tests covering all endpoints and validation
